description: Refactor CodePilot, ResearchPilot, FinancePilot, and HealthPilot to extend IntelligentAgent with LLM-driven logic. Each uses AI for its domain-specific analysis instead of hardcoded rules.
steps: Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/code-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Replace hardcoded analyzeChanges() string-matching (console.log, 'any' type) with AI-powered code review: call aiEngine.infer() with diff content and system prompt for code review. Register tools: 'code.review', 'code.suggest_fix', 'code.open_pr', 'code.run_tests'. Keep CodeChange, CodeReviewResult, CodeIssue, CodeSuggestion interfaces stable.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/research-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Replace hardcoded generateSummary()/extractKeyFindings() with AI summarization: call aiEngine.infer() for web research summarization with citation extraction. Register tools: 'research.web_fetch', 'research.summarize', 'research.extract_citations', 'research.export_to_docs'. Keep ResearchSource, ResearchResult interfaces stable.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/finance-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Replace hardcoded analyzeExpenses() with AI-driven categorization and insight generation. Add opt-in guard: constructor takes optIn: boolean param, refuse to execute if not opted in. Set defaultPermission to OBSERVE (read-only, never executes trades). Register tools: 'finance.categorize', 'finance.summarize_spending', 'finance.detect_anomaly'. Keep Expense, FinanceInsight interfaces stable.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/health-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Replace hardcoded analyzeTrends() with AI-driven health trend analysis and weekly digest generation. Add opt-in guard same as FinancePilot. Add medical advice filter: system prompt explicitly states 'never give medical advice, only summarize data'. Register tools: 'health.track_metric', 'health.generate_digest', 'health.trend_analysis'. Keep HealthMetric, HealthReminder, HealthResult interfaces stable.

Update test files for all four pilots (code-pilot.test.ts, research-pilot.test.ts, finance-pilot.test.ts, health-pilot.test.ts) to mock AIEnginePort and verify AI-driven behavior. Test opt-in guards for finance and health pilots.
acceptance_criteria: All four pilots extend IntelligentAgent with AI-driven logic
No hardcoded string matching remains for analysis/classification
FinancePilot and HealthPilot have opt-in guards that reject execution when not opted in
HealthPilot system prompt contains medical advice prohibition
FinancePilot never registers any tool that can execute trades
All tests pass with mocked AI engine
findings: All 349 tests pass (41 test files). Typecheck and lint clean. All 4 pilots extend IntelligentAgent with AI-driven logic. Opt-in guard for Finance/Health transitions to FAILED state (not throws) since WorkerAgent.run() does not catch errors from execute(). Pre-commit prettier reformatted files. Commit message must be under 100 chars due to commitlint.
